caption:
The lecture hall was empty, but I didn't care. 😒💃 I adjusted the silk blouse I wore under my blazer, the fabric cool against my skin, and walked toward the podium. The last few students lingered, eyes darting my way, drawn to the sway of my hips as I moved. One particular guy, handsome, nervous, stayed behind. 😳 'Professor,' he called, voice cracking. 'Just... one question.' 💭📚

I leaned on the desk, the wood creaking beneath my weight, my pencil skirt riding up just enough to catch the "light". 💅 'Ask away,' I purred, my red heels clicking against the floor. 👠

The air grew thick as we moved to my office, the heavy door clicking shut behind us. 🔥 I turned, letting the blazer fall open slightly, showcasing the deep V-neck of my blouse. 🤫 'Office hours are over,' I whispered, closing the distance between us. 🌙 'But the night isn't.' 

He stepped closer, and the scent of his cologne mixed with the vanilla of my perfume. 🫦 I traced a finger down his tie, the silk sliding against his skin. 👇 'Did you like the lecture?' 📖 I asked, tilting my head, my hair cascading over my shoulder. 'Or do you prefer the private lessons?' 🔥👉

The room was quiet, save for the dark hum of the campus outside. 🤐 I smiled, knowing exactly what I was. 😏 Not just a teacher, but a temptation he couldn't resist. As I walked to the window, the city lights reflecting in my eyes, I waited. 🪟 He knew what I wanted, and I knew what he wanted. The only question was, who would take control? 🤷‍♀️👑

#UniversitySecrets #ProfessorLife #LateNightLectures #Curves #SexyTeacher #CampusLife #OfficeHours #PowerMoves #SilkBlouse #DarkAcademy
